description: Style NoteCut a dash with these sandals for the cosmopolitan male from coolers. Styled in sophisticated leather, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket.Product DetailsBlack leather upper with forefoot and midfoot straps and a toe separatorElasticated gussets on the sides of the midfoot strapPadded footbed with branding on the heelUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel and patterned grooves Material and CareLeather and rubberDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
